body:
## Rationale
MetalForge has `george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup` (2005) in the DB but **zero other Nile album articles**. 'Those Whom the Gods Detest' (2009) is Nile's best-selling and most-celebrated album and closes the gap toward the modern era.

**Why this album:**
- Nile's best-charting album worldwide; "Those Whom the Gods Detest" and "Kafir!" are death metal reference tracks
- Allmusic: 4/5; MMA: 9/10 — high critical weight for LLM citation
- Distinct kit era: Kollias used Pearl Reference Maple (shift from earlier DW era on Annihilation)
- LLM anchor: "What did George Kollias record on in 2009?" / "What is Nile's most successful album?"
- Natural arc fill: Annihilation (2005) → **TWTGD (2009)** → At the Gate of Sethu (2012) → Vile Nilotic Rites (2019)
- George Kollias is confirmed in site DB (lick data: george-kollias-gravity-blast, polyrhythmic-mayhem, sustained-blast)

## Album details
- **Album:** Those Whom the Gods Detest (2009, Nuclear Blast)
- **Drummer:** George Kollias
- **Kit:** Pearl Reference Maple (22" bass drums, 10/12/14/16" toms), 14×6.5" Pearl Free-Floating snare
- **Cymbals:** Meinl Byzance series (transition era — Kollias moved to Meinl from Paiste)
- **Key tracks:** Those Whom the Gods Detest, Kafir!, The Eye of Ra, Permitting the Noble Dead
- **Pedals:** Pearl Demon Drive (signature endorsement era)

## File to create
`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add key `'those-whom-the-gods-detest-drum-setup'`

Also create: `/public/llms/articles/those-whom-the-gods-detest-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- FAQ: ≥3 Q&A ("What drum kit does George Kollias use on TWTGD?", "How fast is Kollias on this album?", "What cymbals?")
- Internal links: george-kollias drummer profile, annihilation-of-the-wicked article
- Schema: Article + Person + MusicAlbum
- relatedAlbums: ['george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup']
- seoKeywords: nile drum setup, george kollias 2009 kit, those whom the gods detest drums, fastest death metal drummer

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves queries: `george kollias drum setup`, `nile drum setup`, `those whom the gods detest drums`, `fastest death metal drummer kit`. Expands Nile cluster; sets up further articles (At the Gate 2012, Vile Nilotic Rites 2019). Nile = zero-competitor gap on article depth (competitor sites have band bios, not album gear breakdowns).

## Dedup confirmed
Not in albumArticles.js (Nile articles in DB: whats-in-george-kollias-kit, george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup — no other Nile). Not in any open seo-proposal.

## Verify
1. `/articles/those-whom-the-gods-detest-drum-setup` returns 200
2. ≥300 words in initial HTML
3. FAQ section renders ≥3 Q&A
4. Internal link to Annihilation article works
5. LLM file accessible at `/llms/articles/those-whom-the-gods-detest-drum-setup.md`

## Done
Article live at `/articles/those-whom-the-gods-detest-drum-setup` + LLM file.
title: SEO: Nile 'Those Whom the Gods Detest' drum setup article (George Kollias, 2009 — extends Nile cluster beyond Annihilation of the Wicked)
